name: BEYOND MEAT, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Beyond Meat is a leading plant-based meat company offering a portfolio of revolutionary plant-based meats. We build meat directly from plants, an innovation that enables consumers to experience the taste, texture and other sensory attributes of popular animal-based meat products while enjoying the nutritional and environmental benefits of eating our plant-based meat products. Our brand promise, Eat What You Love, represents a strong belief that there is a better way to feed our...
